<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Detect parameter mutation. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
func normalize(value string) string { value = strings.TrimSpace(value); return value }
```

## Good

```go
func normalize(value string) string { normalized := strings.TrimSpace(value); return normalized }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only modifies-parameter`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
